title: New Species of Ancient Bear-Dog Identified in Spain
description: Paleontologists have identified a previously unknown species of amphicyonid -- the extinct family of carnivorous mammals popularly known as bear-dogs -- from two specimens unearthed at a rich fossil site in the Vallès-Penedès Basin near Barcelona, Spain.

title: Ancient DNA Unveils Complex Post-Roman Society

title: Ancient squirrel poop from Arctic permafrost contains DNA from mammoths, bison, horses and big cats
description: Prehistoric squirrel droppings were analyzed and found to contain genetic material of numerous ice-age beasts, plants, microbes and fungi.

title: May 2026 — Monthly analysis of Russian fossil fuel exports and sanctions
description: Key findings In May 2026, Russia’s fossil fuel export revenues increased by 2% month-on-month to EUR 726 mn per day despite export volumes remaining roughly the same as in April. Russia’s crude oil export revenues grew marginally by 1% month-on-month to EUR 362 mn per day, while volumes increased by 8%. Crude oil loadings at ...

title: Ancient squirrel poop from Arctic permafrost contains DNA from mammoths, bison, horses and big cats - Live Science
description: Ancient squirrel poop from Arctic permafrost contains DNA from mammoths, bison, horses and big cats Live Science Ground squirrel coprolites preserve complex archives of ancient environmental DNA over 700,000 years Nature Ancient Squirrels Feasted on Meat From Carcasses of Mammoths, Bison, and Even Big Cats ZME Science Researchers Investigated Ancient Squirrel Poop Frozen in Permafrost and Found Enlightening Details About the Animal's Ecosystem Smithsonian Magazine Ancient ground squirrels ate mammoth meat.
